title: JaWi's Modpack
description: Give Feedback in Issues! Just a lil 300+ mods modpack to use with friends, feel free to test out and have fun. Free E included!
body:
For quite some time I was doing what I call "Butchering" modpacks, that is grabbin a modpack that I like and adding/removing mods to fit to my dream playstyle, so I realized lately, why not just make a modpack?
So yeah, hope someone will find this and enjoy, not a big project, just some first time hobby.
The Vibe I was going for was "Vanilla Enhanced RPG".

Nvidia Graphics card recommended, if you use any other delete "Nvidium" from the mod list/folder

Modpack includes mods from Modrinth and Curseforge

<details>
<summary>Credits to mods:</summary>

Macaw's Fences and Walls:
https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-fences-and-walls

Macaw's Furniture
https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-furniture

Macaw's Bridges
https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-bridges

Macaw's Roofs
https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-roofs

Macaw's Windows
https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-windows

Macaw's Trapdoors
https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-trapdoors

Zenith Attributes
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zenith-attributes

Credits Resource packs:

Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/

</details>

For full experience recommend the use of Nether's Delight:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nethers-delight-fabric

Which could not be included due to licensing
